name: Bug Report
about: Report a defect in AgentGuard MCP
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug

---

## Summary

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Environment

- AgentGuard version: (run `agentguard version`)
- Python version: (run `python --version`)
- OS: (Windows / macOS / Linux)
- MCP client: (Claude Code / Cursor / other)
- Operating mode: (dev / federal)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Audit Log (if relevant)

Paste relevant output from `agentguard audit tail`. Redact any sensitive data.

## Policy Config (if relevant)

Paste your `agentguard.yaml` policy section. Redact secrets.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.

---

**Security bugs:** Do not report security vulnerabilities here. Email the maintainer directly.
